title: psychotria desseinii subsp. luxenii
intro: Psychotria desseinii subsp. luxenii, also known as Katsogo, is a plant species from the Rubiaceae family, native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria desseinii subsp. luxenii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and fighting off infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, with the leaves being the most commonly used part for herbal preparations.
